name: Turkey Bayou Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, cored and seeded, finely chopped
1/4 cup Regular or reduced-calorie mayonnaise-type dressing for garnish (optional)
1 Small ripe avocado, sliced, for garnish (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the ground turkey is highly seasoned as it has a mild flavor.
2. Preheat coals for grilling.
3. Mix scallions, bell pepper, garlic, cilantro and spices in a bowl with 1 lb ground turkey until well combined. Season to taste using salt and black pepper.
4. Form mixture into four equal patties.
5. Grill the patties over hot coals for about 5-6 minutes per side.
6. Spread the toasted buns with mayonnaise-type dressing if desired, then top each patty with avocado slices before serving.
Per serving (with avocado slices and reduced-calorie mayonnaise-type dressing): 346 calories, 13 grams fat, 62 milligrams cholesterol.
